package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for response_dto_outside_transport_package: Response envelope structs that live in persistence or repository packages instead of transport or API contract packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule145NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule145NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule145NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario145Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule145NegativeService, input Rule145NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
